1.21.1.1.0.2:
- Added 1.12.2 support
- The 1.12.2 build is now an optional mod — servers running it no longer kick players who don't have it installed, and you can run it client-side to join servers that don't (the Fabric/NeoForge builds already behaved this way)
- Removed the /sprawlcrafting command because it shouldn't have made it into the release anyways lol
